title: Ballot Box Bunnies
short_description: Read the vote tally, then chase down the right bunny — most votes, the majority winner, or 🚫 nobody — before they all hop into the burrow.
description: It's election day in Carrot Town and the bunnies are voting for their next mayor! Read the vote tally on the board, then chase down the correct bunny before they all hop into the burrow. Some rounds ask who got the MOST votes; others ask who won a MAJORITY — more than half — and sometimes the fair answer is 🚫 nobody. It's a real-time counting arcade game that teaches the non-partisan basics of civics: tallying votes and understanding what a majority actually means, because in a real vote everyone gets a say and the most votes wins. Grade bands ramp from 'who got the most' with two bunnies, to majorities with more candidates, to bigger counts and close calls, and the bunnies hop faster every round. A free online civics and voting game for kids in grades 1–5, with quick-chase and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the correct bunny — the one with the most votes, the majority winner, or 🚫 No majority — before they all hop into the burrow.
